completed: Supabase fraud_flags table (email, ip, fingerprint, reason, created_at)
RPC assess_signup_risk — velocity + disposable email + pattern checks
RPC record_signup_fraud — logs signup_attempt + high_risk:* flags

velocity.enforcement: Blocks signup before auth.users insert (assess_signup_risk RPC)

high_risk_flags: suspicious_local_part — test@, temp@, fake@, spam@, admin@ prefixes
velocity_exceeded:* — logged but signup already blocked
rules.make_com_role: Secondary alerting when velocity >= 2 or high_risk:* row inserted; writes make_velocity_alert rows

next_steps: Add Supabase Database Webhook on fraud_flags INSERT → MAKE_COM_FRAUD_WEBHOOK
Review fraud_flags weekly in Supabase dashboard (service role)
Optional Phase 2: CAPTCHA on repeated medium-risk attempts
key_decisions: Lean rules for one-man shop — no paid fraud vendor
Authoritative checks in Supabase RPC (not client-only)
fraud_flags doubles as velocity log (reason=signup_attempt) to avoid extra tables
Make.com is alerting layer, not primary gate
Mobile uses fingerprint only; web uses IP + fingerprint
blockers: Migration must be applied before signup checks work in production
